notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Salvador Perez. Cam Smith scores. Taylor Trammell to 3rd. Christian Vázquez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez hits a grand slam (24) to center field. Taylor Trammell scores. Christian Vázquez scores. Jeremy Peña scores.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Yordan Alvarez out at 3rd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Yordan Alvarez out at 3rd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews homers (5) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith singles on a ground ball to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Joey Loperfido to 3rd. Joey Loperfido advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Kameron Misner to 3rd. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Carter Jensen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Kameron Misner to 3rd. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Carter Jensen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins hit by pitch. Salvador Perez to 3rd. Michael Massey to 2nd.
